  1. org.springframework.ai.audio.transcription

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.audio.transcription

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.audio.transcription
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.audio.transcription
 
org.springframework.ai.openai
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.audio.transcription used by org.springframework.ai.audio.transcription
    Class
    Description
    AudioTranscription
    Represents a response returned by the AI.
    AudioTranscriptionMetadata
    Metadata associated with an audio transcription result.
    AudioTranscriptionOptions
    Options for audio transcription.
    AudioTranscriptionPrompt
    Represents an audio transcription prompt for an AI model.
    AudioTranscriptionResponse
    A response containing an audio transcription result.
    AudioTranscriptionResponseMetadata
    Metadata associated with an audio transcription response.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.audio.transcription used by org.springframework.ai.openai
    Class
    Description
    AudioTranscriptionOptions
    Options for audio transcription.
    AudioTranscriptionPrompt
    Represents an audio transcription prompt for an AI model.
    AudioTranscriptionResponse
    A response containing an audio transcription result.
    TranscriptionModel
    A transcription model is a type of AI model that converts audio to text.
